summary: Frontend-only test of the new 'Show more examples' collapse feature on Split Sleeper Trainer Learn tab (Badge 042 / PIN 1234 → /hours-of-service/split-sleeper → Learn). All acceptance criteria pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: the review_request mentioned the route as '/hos/training/module-split', but the actual route in App.js is '/hours-of-service/split-sleeper'. Documentation mismatch only — feature works.
test_credentials: Badge 042 / PIN 1234 (two-step login: badge → Continue → PIN → Continue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Split Sleeper is at /hours-of-service/split-sleeper (not /hos/training/module-split). Login is a 2-step flow: enter badge, click Continue, then enter PIN. All learn-more-btn-SLx and learn-extras-SLx / learn-extra-SLx-N data-testids are wired and verified.

SL1.btn_text_when_open: − Hide extra examples · subtitle lists both extras

extras_titles: Two SB blocks but neither is ≥7h ✓
3h SB + 7h OFF — longer is OFF, not SB ✓
Evening start · SB period split by midnight ✓
10h straight SB across midnight — NOT a split ✓

regression.totals_strip: OFF/SB/D/OD chips with TOTAL 24:00 visible in screenshot ✓
regression.brackets_and_shift_markers: green qualifying brackets, gold counted brackets, START/END flags visible in screenshot ✓
